name: inmanta-module-podman

metadata.name: inmanta-module-podman
metadata.summary: Simple module to manage podman resources

documentation:
# inmanta-module-podman

[![pypi version](https://img.shields.io/pypi/v/inmanta-module-podman.svg)](https://pypi.python.org/pypi/inmanta-module-podman/)
[![build status](https://img.shields.io/github/actions/workflow/status/edvgui/inmanta-module-podman/continuous-integration.yml)](https://github.com/edvgui/inmanta-module-podman/actions)

This package is an adapter that is meant to be used with the inmanta orchestrator: https://docs.inmanta.com

methods.name: inmanta_plugins.podman.resources.abc.HandlerABC.whoami
documentation: Check which user is currently executing the commands on the remote host.

methods.name: inmanta_plugins.podman.resources.abc.HandlerABC.run_command
documentation:
Execute a command on the host targeted by the agent, and return the result.
The returned value is a tuple containing in that order: stdout, stderr, return code.

```
param ctx

The handler context object used by the handler at runtime

param resource

The resource object used by the handler at runtime

param command

The command to run on the host

param timeout

The maximum duration the command can take to run

param cwd

The directory in which the command should be executed

param env

Some environment variables to pass to the command
```

functions.name: inmanta_plugins.podman.resources.image.valid_digest
documentation:
Check if the given digest value is a match for one of the repo digests
entries. The format of the repo digests is \<repository>:\<tag>@\<digest>

```
param digest

The digest to validate

param repo_digests

The list of repo digest to compare it to
```

methods.name: inmanta_plugins.podman.resources.image.ImageFromSourceResource.get_options
documentation: Create the list of options that can be used to build the image.

methods.name: inmanta_plugins.podman.resources.image.ImageFromSourceResource.get_digest
documentation:
The digest can't be known before building the image, so we just
return None

functions.name: inmanta_plugins.podman.resources.network.merge
documentation:
Merge the config into the base_config. This is similar to calling the
update method of a dict, except that we are here merging lists as well.

```
param base_config

The base config, that we want to update with our config

param config

The config whose content we want to insert into the base
config.
```

functions.name: inmanta_plugins.podman.resources.network.build_create_command
documentation:
Helper method to build the podman network create command based on
the config that can be read from the resource.

```
param config

The config that should be converted to a create command.
```

methods.name: inmanta_plugins.podman.resources.network.NetworkResource.get_config
documentation:
Build the network expected config, as should be returned by the inspect
command.

functions.name: inmanta_plugins.podman.removesuffix
documentation:
Remove the given suffix from the input string.

```
param s

The string that should remove the suffix from.

param suffix

The suffix to remove from the string, if it has it.
```

functions.name: inmanta_plugins.podman.shlex_join
documentation:
Join all the parts of the command into a string that can safely be parsed
by a shell as a valid command.

```
param cmd

All the parts of the command
```

functions.name: inmanta_plugins.podman.plus
documentation: Will be replaced by https://github.com/inmanta/inmanta-core/issues/1799

functions.name: inmanta_plugins.podman.minus
documentation: Will be replaced by https://github.com/inmanta/inmanta-core/issues/1799

functions.name: inmanta_plugins.podman.inline_options
documentation:
Convert a dict of options into a comma-separated list of key=value pairs.

```
param options

The options dict to serialize into a string.
```

functions.name: inmanta_plugins.podman.join
documentation:
Join all the elements in the list together, use the separator in
between each joined part.

```
param parts

The list of string we want to join

param separator

The separator to use in the join
```

functions.name: inmanta_plugins.podman.option
documentation:
Helper function to create a cli option with the given name and value,
or None if the value is None.

```
param name

The name of the cli option

param value

The value of the cli option
```

functions.name: inmanta_plugins.podman.options
documentation:
Helper function to a repeating cli option, based on the given sequence
of objects. The provided object should have the `cli_option` attribute,
providing the value for the option.

```
param name

The name of the cli option

param values

The list of objects
```

functions.name: inmanta_plugins.podman.extra_args
documentation:
Helper function to provide the list of serialized extra arguments assigned
to a container like entity, for a specific command.

```
param command

The command which wants to fetch all the special arguments.

param args

The full set of arguments which might contain extra arguments
for our command.
```

functions.name: inmanta_plugins.podman.container_rm
documentation:
Create the rm command required to cleanup a container.

```
param container

The container that should be removed.

param force

Force removal of a running or unusable container

param ignore

Ignore errors when a specified container is missing

param cidfile

Read the container ID from the file

param time

Seconds to wait for stop before killing the container
```

functions.name: inmanta_plugins.podman.container_run
documentation:
Create the run command required to start the given container.

```
param container

The container that should be started.

param cidfile

Write the container ID to the file

param cgroups

control container cgroup configuration ("enabled"|"disabled"|"no-conmon"|"split")

param pod_id_file

Read the pod ID from the file

param sdnotify

control sd-notify behavior ("container"|"conmon"|"ignore")

param detach

Run container in background and print container ID

param replace

If a container with the same name exists, replace it
```

functions.name: inmanta_plugins.podman.container_stop
documentation:
Create the stop command required to stop a container.

```
param container

The container that should be stopped.

param ignore

Ignore errors when a specified container is missing

param cidfile

Read the container ID from the file

param time

Seconds to wait for stop before killing the container
```

functions.name: inmanta_plugins.podman.pod_create
documentation:
Create the create command required to create the given pod.

```
param pod

The pod that should be created.

param infra_conmon_pidfile

Path to the file that will receive the PID of conmon

param pod_id_file

Read the pod ID from the file

param exit_policy

Behaviour when the last container exits

param replace

If a pod with the same name exists, replace it
```

functions.name: inmanta_plugins.podman.pod_rm
documentation:
Create the rm command required to cleanup a pod.

```
param pod

The pod that should be removed.

param force

Force removal of a running pod by first stopping all containers,
then removing all containers in the pod.

param ignore

Ignore errors when a specified pod is missing

param pod_id_file

Read the pod ID from the file

param time

Seconds to wait for stop before killing the pod
```

functions.name: inmanta_plugins.podman.pod_start
documentation:
Create the start command required to start a pod.

```
param pod

The pod that should be started.

param pod_id_file

Read the pod ID from the file
```

functions.name: inmanta_plugins.podman.pod_stop
documentation:
Create the stop command required to stop a pod.

```
param pod

The pod that should be stopped.

param ignore

Ignore errors when a specified pod is missing

param pod_id_file

Read the pod ID from the file

param time

Seconds to wait for stop before killing the pod
```
